_note: Page templates distilled from the Beach & Bay Press 5/8/26 issue (16 pages, 61 blocks). Coordinates in POINTS, content-relative (origin = top-left inside margins; content area 747 x 713). Everything snaps to the quarter grid: vertical x = 0, 189.75, 379.5, 569.25, 747 (4-col) with the ½ fold at ~373.5; horizontal y = 0, 356.5, 535, 713. Feed these to the annotator as one-click page skeletons ('start from template'), then tune. kind = NewsWell TemplateBlockKind.

split.label: A · The Split
split.desc: Vertical ½ fold — editorial one side, stacked ads the other. Issue workhorse (pp 5,7,8,10,11). Mirror by swapping kinds.

top-story-bottom-ads.label: B · Top Story / Bottom Ads
top-story-bottom-ads.desc: Horizontal ½ fold — full-width lead on top, ad row across the bottom (pp 3,14,15,16).

ad-grid.label: C · The Ad Grid
ad-grid.desc: Header band (article or classifieds filler) + 4-col x 2-row ad matrix on the quarter grid (pp 9,12).

stacked-features.label: D · Stacked Features
stacked-features.desc: Two full-width stories stacked, no ads (p 6).

utility.label: E · Utility
utility.desc: Filler-dominant standing matter — masthead rail + story (p2), or legals/puzzles (p13). Vertical ½ fold, filler one side.
